title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.220 - Compensation of referees
text:
515.220.  Compensation of referees. — Referees, in the absence of any special agreement, shall receive such compensation for their services as the court in which the case is pending may allow, not exceeding ten dollars per day.
(RSMo 1939 § 1162) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 996; 1919 § 1447; 1909 § 2016
